name: add
asm:
0x140001450      PUSH     RBP
  0x140001451      MOV      RBP, RSP
  0x140001454      MOV      dword ptr [RBP + 0x10], ECX
  0x140001457      MOV      dword ptr [RBP + 0x18], EDX
  0x14000145A      MOV      EDX, dword ptr [RBP + 0x10]
  0x14000145D      MOV      EAX, dword ptr [RBP + 0x18]
  0x140001460      ADD      EAX, EDX
  0x140001462      POP      RBP
  0x140001463      RET
